summary: Arq. Roberto Salinas, Dirección de Obras Públicas, Municipio de Los Cabos. Project: public_civic — new 2,000m² public library in Cabo San Lucas, BCS. Key program: adult reading room (400m²), children's reading room (200m²), closed stacks (300m²), computer lab (150m²), multi-purpose room (200m²), administration (150m²), restrooms, lobby, parking, storage. Special features: solar, accessibility compliance, civic art space. Site: flat municipal land, no hydrology concerns. Budget signal: $1.5M USD approved. Procurement: obra pública — must comply with public works guidelines.
